title: [codereview-3] docs/bench-operations.md: update should mention use of EC2 builder for the Heltec UART1 test per task and AGENTS.md
description: The build test was documented but task requires 'Use EC2 for build'. Add note to run via ./scripts/ec2-claude.sh or attach volume on EC2 instance with LICHEN tag. P4 documentation completeness. Fix it. Also verify the python verification command works without hardware by testing serial params.
